name: @forwood/task-engine
description: Faithful TypeScript interpreter of VS Code .vscode/tasks.json. Emits declarative task records (label, command, args, options, dependsOn, dependsOrder, presentation, ...) for surface-specific dispatchers (tmux, maiTerm, future) to translate into native execution. Run with Node v22.6+ which strips TS types natively — no build step.
